subcodes.title: Words to Albert Vail, spoken on 1919-11-23
subcodes.first_line: Each one of the friends should try to guide one soul--those who are worthy--not the persons who enter the Cause and bring degradation to it; not like Fareed.
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
